channel.title: The Idaho Stack
channel.description: Idaho technology news, business, infrastructure, and practical reporting.

item.title: What Idaho’s Tech Economy Is Actually Made Of
item.description: Idaho’s technology economy is not apps first. It is memory chips, nuclear labs, broadband buildout, irrigation systems, manufacturing fixes, and small businesses trying to make AI useful.

item.title: Idaho Tech Briefing: What We’re Tracking First
item.description: Micron, INL, broadband, water, small-business AI, repair culture, and the workforce questions underneath it all.

item.title: Why Idaho Matters More to American Technology Than Most People Think
item.description: Idaho is not trying to be Silicon Valley. Its technology story is more physical: chips, reactors, farms, broadband, repair, and the small businesses where new tools either work or fail.
